papers.title: SUGAR: A Scalable Human-Video-Driven Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation Learning Framework
CEER: Compliant End-Effector and Root Control as a Unified Interface for Hierarchical Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
papers.summary: 本文提出CEER框架，通过 Compliance-aware 的末端执行器-根部（EE-root）任务空间控制抽象，结合教师-学生蒸馏方法，将复杂全身控制器简化为低维 EE-root 命令接口，实现模块化的人形机器人 loco-manipulation 分层控制。

papers.title: Domain-Adaptive Communication-Rate Optimization for Sim-to-Real Humanoid-Robot Wireless XR Teleoperation
Adversarial Stress Testing of SPARK Humanoid Safety Filters
EgoTraj: Real-World Egocentric Human Trajectory Dataset for Multimodal Prediction

companyNews.title: Tesla Optimus Pilot Production Line Gets First Look on Video - BASENOR - Tesla Accessories
Tesla ends Model S and Model X production as factory pivots to Optimus robots - Yahoo Autos
companyNews.summary: Tesla停止Model S和Model X生产，将工厂转向生产Optimus人形机器人，标志着汽车龙头正式入局人形机器人制造业，将加速行业商业化进程。

companyNews.title: Atlas Robot Moves 23 kg Refrigerator for Hyundai Production - 조선일보
companyNews.summary: Atlas机器人在现代工厂成功搬运23公斤冰箱，展现人形机器人在工业物流中的实用价值，推动行业商业化进程

companyNews.title: Boston Dynamics turns Atlas into a stronger industrial contender - Startup Fortune
companyNews.summary: Boston Dynamics升级Atlas机器人，提升其工业应用性能，强化了在工业机器人市场的竞争力，推动人形机器人向实用化迈进。

companyNews.title: Atlas Signals Work-Ready Robot for Deployment in Hyundai Motor Plant - Businesskorea
companyNews.summary: Boston Dynamics的Atlas机器人即将部署至现代汽车工厂，标志着其从实验室原型正式进入商业化工业应用阶段，这对人形机器人行业的实用化落地具有里程碑意义。
